name: embeadings
description: Deterministic, read-only coordination triage for Beads and Linear work trackers.

interface.longDescription: Run bounded semantic triage and code-surface collision reviews through the installed embead CLI, then apply agent judgment to its deterministic evidence.
defaultPrompt: Triage this tracker for coordination risks.
Find active work that may touch the same code.
Evaluate emBEADings against my own review.
